headline: Morgan Stanley’s Q2 CIO survey shows these names are winning the race
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley's second-quarter 2026 CIO survey found IT budget growth expectations for the year ticked higher quarter-over-quarter to 3.8%, with Microsoft and the security software category emerging as the clearest beneficiaries, according to analyst Sanjit Singh.

content.title: Morgan Stanley’s Q2 CIO survey shows these names are winning the race
content.summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley's second-quarter 2026 CIO survey found IT budget growth expectations for the year ticked higher quarter-over-quarter to 3.8%, with Microsoft and the security software category emerging as the clearest beneficiaries, according to analyst Sanjit Singh.

headline: Big banks on pace for record $180B in trading revenue
summary: KBW, a Stifel company Managing Director & Head of U.S. Bank Research Christopher McGratty joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to break down the latest bank earnings as the five largest US banks: JPMorgan (JPM), Goldman Sachs (GS), Morgan Stanley (MS) Bank of America (BAC) and Citigroup (C) which are on pace to generate a record $180 billion in trading revenue in 2026.

content.title: Big banks on pace for record $180B in trading revenue
content.description: KBW, a Stifel company Managing Director & Head of U.S. Bank Research Christopher McGratty joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to break down the latest bank earnings as the five largest US banks: JPMorgan (JPM), Goldman Sachs (GS), Morgan Stanley (MS) Bank of America (BAC) and Citigroup (C) which are on pace to generate a record $180 billion in trading revenue in 2026.
content.summary: KBW, a Stifel company Managing Director & Head of U.S. Bank Research Christopher McGratty joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to break down the latest bank earnings as the five largest US banks: JPMorgan (JPM), Goldman Sachs (GS), Morgan Stanley (MS) Bank of America (BAC) and Citigroup (C) which are on pace to generate a record $180 billion in trading revenue in 2026.
